creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Hi, John!
My patch is a small amount of what has been done several days ago.
I think we should wait a couple of days for official release of squid 3.4.9 which contains even more memory leak fixes. Here is a link http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v3/3.4/changesets/SQUID_3_4_9.html
I'll make a new PR then.

Don't know what to do with this PR.
